name: mail
description: Sends transactional email (password resets, notifications) over SMTP.

settings.label: SMTP host
settings.description: Hostname of your SMTP relay, e.g. smtp.mailgun.org.

settings.label: Port
settings.description: 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for implicit TLS, 25 for unencrypted.

settings.label: Username
settings.description: Leave blank if your relay does not require authentication.

settings.label: Password
settings.description: Leave blank to keep the current password.

settings.label: From name
settings.description: Optional display name shown alongside the From address.

settings.label: Timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum time allowed for the SMTP connection and dialog.
